title: Asset management
text: Physical devices, software platforms, and data flows shall be inventoried and managed consistent with business and risk objectives.

title: Risk assessment
text: The organization shall identify cybersecurity risks to systems, assets, data, and capabilities, including threat and vulnerability analysis.

title: Identity and access management
text: Access to assets and associated facilities shall be limited to authorized users, processes, or devices and managed according to risk.

title: Data security
text: Information and records shall be managed consistent with risk strategy to protect confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

title: Continuous monitoring
text: Networks and systems shall be monitored to detect potential cybersecurity events and anomalous activity in a timely manner.

title: Response planning
text: Response processes and procedures shall be executed and maintained to ensure timely and effective response to detected incidents.

title: Recovery planning
text: Recovery processes and procedures shall be executed and maintained to restore systems and services impacted by cybersecurity incidents.

title: Cyber governance oversight
text: Cybersecurity governance, responsibilities, and oversight mechanisms shall be defined and integrated with enterprise risk management.
